title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Stolen Spotlight

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen wins the spring Tenno Sho. She
ran earnestly in order to bring the illustrious
spring plaque home to the Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Mejiro Palmer runs for her
own freedom... She begins to wonder if that is
really something to be proud of. Or is she just
being selfish?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the spring Grand Prix, the
Takarazuka Kinen. Will Mejiro Palmer be able to
be her true self at a festival race the fans go crazy
for?
